publishedAbstract: Python script "ceph-external-cluster-details-exporter.py" unable to adopt an external `Ceph Cluster` if RBD pool name contains underscore(_) or period(.) A portion of `ceph df` output showing the issue: ~~~--- POOLS--- POOL ID PGS STORED OBJECTS USED %USED MAX AVAIL device_health_metrics 1 1 0 B 0 0 B 0 21 GiB MyCephBlockPool 5 32 1.7 KiB 10 108 KiB 0 21 GiB <-- Will work My.Ceph.Block.Pool 6 256 63 GiB 15.76k 157 GiB 84.78 21 GiB <-- Will not work My_Ceph_Block_Pool 7 512 119 GiB 30.58k 358 GiB 84.78 21 GiB <-- Will not work ~~~
publishedTitle: ODF: "ceph-external-cluster-details-exporter.py" unable to adopt an external Ceph cluster if RBD pool name contains underscore(_) or period(.)
